step_rationale: Cytoskeletal component; platelet activation and adhesion anchor.
mechanism: Beta-actin is essential for platelet shape change, cytoskeletal reorganization during activation, and the adhesion-molecule-mediated tethering to exposed collagen/vWF.

references.title: Serum proteomic analysis reveals the cardioprotective effects of Shexiang Baoxin Pill and Suxiao Jiuxin Pill in a rat model of acute myocardial infarction.
Molecular signature of coronary stent thrombosis: oxidative stress and innate immunity cells.
